titleStmt.title: SII 40.49: original edition by K. Munirathnam
No. 49. (A.R. No. B. 28 of 1930.) Pedda Gārlapāḍu, Palnad Taluk, Guntur District, Andhra Pradesh.

summary.p: On a slab set up in front of the Vēṇugōpalasvāmi temple in the village.
This is dated Śaka 1695, Nandana, Māgha śu. 15, corresponding to 1773 A.D., February 7, Sunday.

Records the reconstruction of the shrine of Vēṇugōpālasvāmi at Pedagārlapāḍu by Kavalavāya Rāmachandra, who also made provision for conducting worship and providing offerings to the deity, after obtaining a grant of land from the Divāṇamvāru. The donar was the son of Gurvi-śeṭṭi and grandson of Yalli-śeṭṭi of Vutakula(?)-gōtra. One Rāmabatter was a witness to this deed.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrī gōpālasvāmī
svasti śrī jayābhyudaya śālivā
hana śakava¨rṣaṁbulu 1695 Aguneṭi
naṁdana nāma saṁvatsara māgha śu
ddha 15 lu śrīmadakhilāṁḍakōṭi brā(bra)
hmāṁḍa nāyakulaina pedagā¨rlapā
ṭi śrī vēṇugōpālasvāmi maṁdira
ṁkhilamai naivēdyadīpārādhanalu le(lē)ka
Anēka dinamulu vuṁḍe ganaka vuta
kula gōtrōdbhavuluṁnnu yalliśeṭṭi
gāri pautṛlunnu gurviśeṭṭigāri
putṛluṁnaina kavalavāyarāmaca
ṁdruḍu punaḥ dēvālayaṁ kaṭṭiṁci
saṁprōkṣaṇa ceyiṁci naivēdya dīpārā
dhanalaku divāṇaṁ vārini Aḍigi kēsa
nuripāṭi naṁnnūru kuṁṭala prā
pti 3 kucceḷla polaṁ sama¨rppiṁśtimi
ganuka yī kaiṁkaryamu Ācaṁdrā
¨rkasthāyigā navadhariṁci dayacā
yavalenu . ślōkaṁ . svadattā dviguṇa
ṁpuṁṇyaṁ . paradattānupālanaṁ . pa
radattāpahareṇa . svadattā niṣphalaṁ
bhavēt . śrī śrī śrī . mā komāḷlu gu
rappalakṣminārāyaṇa śitārāmuḍu veṁkaṭa
rāmuḍu kōdaṁḍarāmuḍu rāmuḍu
mīruṁnnumī putrapautra pāraṁparya
ṁtaraṁ yī dharmamu naḍipiṁccavalaśina
di . śirāṁdāsu pāpābattuni komā
ruḍu rāmābattuni vrālū . śrī .
Digital edition of SII 40.49 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
